_notes.workers: This project uses SQLite plus php artisan serve locally, which is single-writer. Concurrent API/UI test workers cause intermittent 500s on write endpoints unrelated to actual bugs.

endpoints.name: Auth login returns Passport bearer token
Update password guarded negative
endpoints.knownIssue: Uses an invalid current password intentionally so the reusable QA password is not changed.

endpoints.name: List CRM companies by business relationship
Get customer by contact
endpoints.knownIssue: Contact-filtered document endpoint can return 500 for CRM people fixtures; route is covered but backend handler needs hardening.

endpoints.name: Get supplier by contact
endpoints.knownIssue: Contact-filtered document endpoint can return 500 for CRM people fixtures; route is covered but backend handler needs hardening.

endpoints.name: Create CRM document upload unsupported
endpoints.knownIssue: Engine sends JSON only; this endpoint expects multipart file upload.

endpoints.name: Create CRM entity image upload unsupported
endpoints.knownIssue: Engine sends JSON only; this endpoint expects multipart image upload.

endpoints.name: Parse CRM import file unsupported
endpoints.knownIssue: Engine sends JSON only; parse endpoint expects an uploaded spreadsheet/CSV file.

endpoints.name: Preview CRM import
endpoints.knownIssue: Preview depends on parsed file payload; included to document route coverage.

endpoints.name: Run CRM import known stub
endpoints.knownIssue: Backend import persistence is TODO/stubbed.

endpoints.name: CRM import status known stub
endpoints.knownIssue: Backend currently hardcodes completed status for any job id.

endpoints.name: List quotations by contact

endpoints.knownIssue: May fail if quotation workflow state does not allow conversion in seed data.

endpoints.name: List sales orders by contact
endpoints.knownIssue: Contact-filtered document endpoint can return 500 for CRM people fixtures; route is covered but backend handler needs hardening.

endpoints.name: Create sales invoice from sales order
endpoints.knownIssue: Backend supports sales invoices, but frontend route is missing and conversion may depend on order state.

endpoints.name: Create direct sales invoice known schema issue
endpoints.knownIssue: Direct invoice request validates contact_id against contacts table while CRM uses people; may fail until schema/rule alignment is fixed.

endpoints.name: List invoices by contact
endpoints.knownIssue: Contact-filtered document endpoint can return 500 for CRM people fixtures; route is covered but backend handler needs hardening.

endpoints.name: Create sales return fixture-dependent
endpoints.knownIssue: Requires a valid posted sales invoice; config documents endpoint but avoids depending on unavailable invoice fixture.

endpoints.name: List purchase orders by contact
endpoints.knownIssue: Contact-filtered document endpoint can return 500 for CRM people fixtures; route is covered but backend handler needs hardening.

endpoints.name: List incoming goods by purchase order
List purchase invoices by contact
endpoints.knownIssue: Contact-filtered document endpoint can return 500 for CRM people fixtures; route is covered but backend handler needs hardening.

endpoints.name: Create credit note from purchase invoice
endpoints.knownIssue: Depends on purchase invoice state and may be rejected in smoke fixture.

endpoints.name: Create stock
endpoints.knownIssue: Stock creation depends on warehouse storage place defaults and Article/Product resolver state.

endpoints.name: Create stock transfer
endpoints.knownIssue: Requires two distinct storage places and sufficient stock; single-place smoke fixture intentionally documents route only.

endpoints.name: Create outgoing stock
endpoints.knownIssue: Requires sufficient stock in the selected storage place.

endpoints.name: Create stock adjustment
endpoints.knownIssue: Stock adjustment creation returns 500 with the generic synthetic stock fixture; requires richer stocked warehouse data.

endpoints.name: Approve stock adjustment
endpoints.knownIssue: Approve action is route-covered with a placeholder UUID because stock adjustment creation is fixture-dependent.

endpoints.name: VAT validation negative smoke
endpoints.knownIssue: Uses invalid VAT to avoid relying on external VIES availability.

endpoints.name: Delete stock adjustment
endpoints.knownIssue: Delete action is route-covered with a placeholder UUID because stock adjustment creation is fixture-dependent.
